positive_feedbacks.name: GIRIKRISHNAN P R
positive_feedbacks.overall_feedback: The course is excellent and it gave me the idea about how python works. As a beginner your way of teaching and classes are excellent.

positive_feedbacks.name: Anjitha Biju
positive_feedbacks.overall_feedback: I had a positive experience. The course was informative.
positive_feedbacks.best_aspect: The step-by-step teaching approach and interactive sessions were the strongest part of the course.

positive_feedbacks.name: Sajna K
positive_feedbacks.overall_feedback: It encouraged me to think deeply, analyze ideas from different perspectives, and develop greater confidence in my learning journey.
positive_feedbacks.best_aspect: Deep Knowledge, Better structure of modules, simple language usage, specificity, clarity, patience, time management, interest generating.

positive_feedbacks.name: Ijas M A
positive_feedbacks.overall_feedback: Attended sessions are good and well explanatory.

positive_feedbacks.name: Greeshma Jayan
positive_feedbacks.best_aspect: Teaching theoretical aspects with examples and practical problems.

positive_feedbacks.name: Halifa A Kabeer
positive_feedbacks.overall_feedback: Class was very helpful, simply conveyed the ideas. Got good basics on Python.

positive_feedbacks.name: LIYA ANN MATHEW
positive_feedbacks.best_aspect: Explaining from the absolute beginner level

positive_feedbacks.name: Elsa Paulson
